domain: Saami / cross-country differential ski wax (spatially-separated tip/tail glide + foot-zone grip wax; same ski has opposite friction regimes by zone; temperature-conditioned)
specific_mechanism: Two opposite friction regimes (low kinetic + high static) spatially separated on same artifact; temperature-conditioned selection.
llm_application: BZFRS: layer split into glide-zone (aggressive LR/frequent updates) and grip-zone (conservative LR/sparse updates); zone boundaries input-distribution-temperature conditioned (cold ID → narrow grip; warm OOD → wider grip).
novelty_claim: DAT (2604.05375), LLMOrbit (2601.14053), Forward Replay (2605.00358) cover related areas. None retrieve spatial-layer-split with bipolar grip/glide friction + input-temperature gating.
